title: VisionVault: Edge AI Vision Platform
summary: An enterprise-grade platform for real-time visual object recognition, tracking, and video intelligence, running on open-source edge models.
description: VisionVault is a distributed computer vision intelligence engine designed to process multiple high-definition video streams concurrently. By integrating Florence-2 for dense image captioning and Grounding DINO for zero-shot detection, it provides sub-100ms analytics and spatial mapping. It is designed to act as an operations and security intelligence hub for smart retail and manufacturing environments.
features: Zero-shot open-vocabulary detection using Grounding DINO
Dense vision-to-text image captioning using Florence-2
Edge-optimized deployment via Docker container orchestration
